name: AI API Gateway V2
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure API Management
services.purpose: Unified AI gateway — intelligent request routing across multiple Azure OpenAI backends, rate limiting per consumer, token-based quota enforcement, retry with failover, request/response transformation, and developer portal for API consumers

dev.note: Single unit, no SLA, prototyping gateway policies

enterprise.note: 4 units, multi-region, VNET injection, self-hosted gateways

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: Backend inference pool — multiple model deployments (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, text-embedding-3-large) behind the gateway for intelligent model routing based on request complexity, cost tier, and latency requirements

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, guaranteed capacity across regions

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.purpose: Semantic response cache — stores AI responses keyed by embedding similarity, reducing redundant inference calls by 30-50%; also manages rate-limit counters, circuit breaker state, and session tokens per consumer

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.purpose: Gateway observability — real-time dashboards for request latency (P50/P95/P99), token consumption per consumer, cache hit ratio, model routing distribution, error rates, and cost attribution per API consumer

services.name: Azure App Configuration
services.purpose: Dynamic gateway configuration — feature flags for canary model rollouts, routing rules, rate-limit thresholds, cache TTL settings, and consumer tier definitions with hot-reload without gateway restart

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Usage analytics and audit store — per-consumer token usage tracking, cost attribution records, request audit logs, SLA compliance data, and billing aggregation for chargeback reporting

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, consumer subscription keys, OpenAI endpoint secrets, Redis connection strings, and TLS certificates for custom gateway domains

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Distributed tracing — end-to-end request correlation from consumer through gateway to AI backend, cache hit/miss telemetry, model selection decisions, and latency breakdown per pipeline stage

optimization_tips: Enable semantic caching with embedding similarity threshold of 0.95 — captures 30-50% of repeated or near-duplicate queries, directly reducing Azure OpenAI token spend without quality degradation
Route simple queries (classification, extraction, summarization under 500 tokens) to GPT-4o-mini at 1/30th the cost of GPT-4o — use APIM policies to inspect prompt complexity and auto-route
Implement tiered rate limits per consumer — free tier gets 100 req/min with GPT-4o-mini only, premium tier gets 1000 req/min with GPT-4o access, enabling cost-proportional SLA guarantees
Use Redis pipeline batching for cache lookups — batch 10-20 similarity checks in a single round-trip instead of sequential calls, reducing cache check latency from 50ms to 5ms
Deploy APIM Developer tier for dev/staging environments ($50/month vs $280+ for Standard) — Developer tier has identical policy engine, only lacks SLA and multi-unit scaling
Use Cosmos DB serverless for dev and low-traffic environments — only pay for consumed RUs instead of provisioned capacity, saving 90% on usage analytics storage during off-peak periods
